It notes that universities are adapting with AI-enabled tools and new curricula, preserving a strong path into software, systems, and theory. For practitioners, the degree still signals foundational competencies that bootcamps can't fully replace.
items.summary_zh: 该文为计算机科学学位在人工智能时代的价值辩护，认为核心概念、解决问题的能力和研究导向仍然关键。指出大学正通过与 AI 工具结合的新课程与教学方式进行调整，为软件、系统与理论提供坚实的培养路径。对从业者而言，学位仍然是一种正式的能力信号， Bootcamp 等路径难以完全取代。

items.title_en: What is the purpose of the lost+found folder in Linux and Unix? (2014)
items.title_zh: Linux/Unix 的 lost+found 文件夹有什么用？（2014）
items.summary_en: The lost+found folder stores inodes recovered after filesystem checks, acting as a repository for orphaned fragments following a crash. It’s mostly of interest to those doing recovery or forensics, not day-to-day users. The feature embodies how Linux/Unix handles recovery while preserving data remnants.
items.summary_zh: lost+found 文件夹是在 Linux/Unix 文件系统自检修复（fsck）时用于存放恢复的 inode 的位置。它保存着在崩溃后被重建出的碎片和孤儿数据，通常并不面向普通用户。其存在的意义在于协助从损坏的文件系统中找回数据。

items.title_en: Zig by Example
items.title_zh: Zig by Example：通过示例学习 Zig 语言
items.summary_en: Zig by Example provides a hands-on guide to the Zig programming language, teaching syntax and idioms through practical samples. It helps readers grasp low-level concepts common in systems programming and compare Zig's approach to C and Rust.
items.summary_zh: Zig by Example 提供一份以示例驱动的Zig语言学习指南，通过实际代码样例教授语法与常用模式。帮助读者掌握系统编程中的底层概念，并对照C与Rust等语言的设计取舍。

items.title_en: Slightly reducing the sloppiness of AI generated front end
items.title_zh: 稍微降低 AI 生成前端的随意性
items.summary_en: A practical note on trimming the 'slop' in AI-generated front ends, offering concrete steps to tighten output: more deterministic styling, stricter prompts, and post-processing checks. The aim is to keep the speed and creativity of AI while delivering reliable, production-ready UI.
items.summary_zh: AI 生成前端的随意性得到了一些改进建议，提出通过更确定的样式、严格的提示和后处理检查等办法来减少输出的混乱。目标是在保持 AI 快速迭代的同时，交付更稳定、可投入生产的 UI 界面。

items.title_en: Vibe coding my way to a healthy family: Introducing Gamow Labs
items.title_zh: Vibe 编码开启家庭健康：Gamow Labs 介绍
items.summary_en: The author introduces Gamow Labs and a 'vibe coding' approach aimed at supporting healthy family life through coding and experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 作者介绍 Gamow Labs 及其“Vibe 编码”方法，致力于通过编码与实验提升家庭健康。文章讲述愿景、初步工作，以及科技在日常生活中的应用前景。

items.title_en: System Card: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 [pdf]
items.title_zh: 系统卡：Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 [PDF]
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases a system card for Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5, outlining intended use, capabilities, and safety constraints. The document clarifies guardrails, risk considerations, and design trade-offs when deploying these models at scale in enterprise contexts.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 公布了 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的系统卡，概述了目标用途、能力与安全约束。文档阐明了在企业部署中的边界、守则及对风险的权衡。

items.title_en: GameBoy Workboy
items.title_zh: Game Boy 的 WorkBoy 键盘扩展
items.summary_en: A retro-hardware project detailing WorkBoy, a hardware addon that turn a Game Boy into a pocket computer with keyboard input and expanded capabilities. It showcases hobbyist ingenuity in repurposing classic hardware for modern usability.
items.summary_zh: 一项复古硬件项目，介绍了 WorkBoy 如何让 Game Boy 变成带键盘输入的袖珍电脑并扩展功能。展示了玩家将经典硬件改造为现代可用工具的创意。

items.title_en: Looking Forward to Postgres 19: Query Hints
items.title_zh: 展望 PostgreSQL 19：查询提示
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL 19 is expected to bring query hints, giving developers a way to influence the planner without changing queries. This could improve performance tuning and explain plans for complex workloads.
items.summary_zh: 预计 PostgreSQL 19 将引入查询提示，使开发者在不修改查询的情况下影响优化器的决策。此举可能提升复杂工作负载的调优效果与执行计划的理解。

items.title_en: Age verification tech could put children at greater risk, says think tank
items.title_zh: 年龄验证技术可能增加儿童风险？
items.summary_en: Think tank warns that age-verification technology could increase risk for children by broadening data collection and surveillance; calls for privacy-preserving designs and robust governance to mitigate harms.
items.summary_zh: 智库警告年龄验证技术可能因扩大数据收集和监控而增加儿童风险，呼吁采用隐私保护设计与健全治理来降低潜在危害。

items.title_en: Waymo Premier
items.title_zh: Waymo Premier 公布/上线
items.summary_en: Waymo unveils Premier, a new tier of autonomous mobility services with enhanced safety and coverage. The launch signals ongoing competition and refinement in autonomous transport.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 推出 Premier 自动驾驶出行服务的新阶段，强调更高的安全性与覆盖范围，体现自动驾驶领域的持续竞争与演进。

items.title_en: Lisp's Influence on Ruby
items.title_zh: Lisp 对 Ruby 的影响
items.summary_en: Explores how Lisp-inspired ideas shaped Ruby's flexibility, metaprogramming culture, and a penchant for DSLs, showing that Lisp’s legacy lives on in modern dynamic languages.
items.summary_zh: 本文解析 Lisp 传统中的理念如何影响 Ruby 的灵活性、元编程文化以及对领域特定语言的偏好，展示 Lisp 的遗产在现代动态语言中的延续。

items.title_en: Rich Sutton on AI creativity and discovery
items.title_zh: Rich Sutton 谈AI的创造力与发现
items.summary_en: Rich Sutton argues that AI creativity stems from how we define objectives and exploration, framing discovery as goal-directed search rather than sudden inspiration. The stance helps temper hype by emphasizing evaluation, robustness, and known limits of current AI systems. It invites a pragmatic view of what AI can and cannot do.
items.summary_zh: Rich Sutton 指出，AI 的创造力来自于目标设定与探索的方式，所谓发现其实是面向目标的搜索而非灵光一现。此观点有助于缓解对 AI 突破性的过度炒作，强调评估、鲁棒性以及当前系统的局限性，促使人们以务实的眼光看待 AI 的能力边界。

items.title_en: Shall we play a game? My AI nuclear simulation
items.title_zh: 要不要来玩个游戏？我的 AI 核武仿真
items.summary_en: An AI-driven nuclear simulation is presented as a game-like exploration of escalation scenarios. It raises questions about how powerful AI systems model high-stakes decision making and the ethical boundaries of simulating real-world weapons. The piece invites reflection on safety, control, and the line between playful experimentation and policy risk.
items.summary_zh: 以游戏化方式展示 AI 对核武升级场景的仿真，引发对强大 AI 如何建模高风险决策的思考以及对在真实武器中的伦理边界的质疑。文中促请读者反思安全、控制与在娱乐性实验与政策风险之间的界线。

items.title_en: Linux 7.1
items.title_zh: Linux 7.1
items.summary_en: Linux 7.1 release brings security fixes, stability improvements, and new hardware support.
items.summary_zh: Linux 7.1 发布，包含安全修复、稳定性改进以及对新硬件的支持。

items.title_en: A giant star may have destroyed itself in one of the rarest explosions
items.title_zh: 一颗巨星可能在罕见爆炸中自我毁灭
items.summary_en: A giant star may have ended its life in one of the universe's rare explosive events, shedding new light on late-stage stellar evolution and diversity of supernova-like explosions.
items.summary_zh: 科学家指出一颗巨星可能在极为罕见的爆炸事件中自我毁灭，为晚期恒星演化与超新星样式的多样性提供新线索。

items.title_en: An Ohio Valley 100k-watt FM signal is severed in broad daylight
items.title_zh: 俄亥俄谷地10万瓦 FM 信号在白天中断
items.summary_en: A 100 kW FM radio signal in the Ohio Valley was severed in broad daylight, highlighting vulnerabilities in broadcast infrastructure and the potential for sabotage or weather-related outages.
items.summary_zh: 俄亥俄谷地一处10万瓦 FM 信号在白天突然中断，暴露了广播基础设施的脆弱性以及潜在的破坏或天气相关中断风险。

items.title_en: The Birth and Death of JavaScript (2014)
items.title_zh: JavaScript 的诞生与消亡（2014）
items.summary_en: A retrospective talk tracing JavaScript's origins, design compromises, and how it evolved into a ubiquitous web language despite early flaws. It highlights the discipline of navigating language design trade-offs and the surprising longevity of a language born from constraints.
items.summary_zh: 这场回顾演讲梳理了 JavaScript 的起源、设计取舍，以及它如何在早期缺陷的背景下发展成无处不在的网页语言，凸显在语言设计取舍中的执着与长期生命力。

items.title_en: 'Sloppenheimer:' Amazon employees mock the company's AI on Slack
items.title_zh: Sloppenheimer：亚马逊员工在 Slack 上嘲笑公司的 AI
items.summary_en: "Sloppenheimer"： Amazon employees mock the company's AI on Slack. Slack threads reveal Amazon employees joking about the company's AI, highlighting skepticism about its reliability and alignment with real-world use. The incident underscores how internal sentiment around AI initiatives can influence public perception and strategy. It also reflects broader tensions between ambitious AI deployments and day-to-day product quality.
items.summary_zh: Slack 聊天记录显示亚马逊员工在讨论公司 AI 时带着嘲讽与怀疑，质疑其可靠性与应用价值。事件揭示了内部情绪如何影响外部对 AI 计划的看法和实施策略。也反映了在大规模 AI 部署中的野心与日常产品质量之间的张力。

items.title_en: A €0.01 bank transfer could compromise a banking AI agent
items.title_zh: 一笔 0.01 欧元的银行转账可能危及银行 AI 助手
items.summary_en: A tiny payment triggers vulnerabilities in a banking AI assistant, underscoring the need for strict input validation and safe sandboxing for financial AI.
items.summary_zh: 仅 0.01 欧元的转账就可能暴露银行 AI 助手中的漏洞，凸显对输入校验和沙箱化的迫切需求。

items.title_en: Reviving Papers with Code
items.title_zh: Papers with Code 重新上线
items.summary_en: Papers with Code is being revived, reestablishing a link between research papers and open-source implementations. The revival could help researchers verify results and reuse code more easily, reinforcing reproducibility in AI and ML.
items.summary_zh: Papers with Code 正在重新上线，重新建立论文与开源实现之间的联系。这一举措将帮助研究者更易验证结果、复用代码，提升 AI/ML 研究的可复现实验性。

items.title_en: 1worldflag: A blue dot on a transparent background
items.title_zh: 1worldflag：透明背景上的蓝点旗帜
items.summary_en: 1worldflag provides a minimalist global flag asset—a blue dot on a transparent canvas—intended for simple, universal branding and web use. This kind of open, easily styled symbol reflects a trend toward lightweight, interoperable design assets.
items.summary_zh: 1worldflag 提供一个极简的全球旗帜图标——透明背景上的蓝点，适用于通用品牌和网页设计。这样的公开、易于使用的符号体现了对轻量级、互操作设计资源的偏好。

items.title_en: The Future of Email
items.title_zh: 邮件的未来
items.summary_en: Outlines trends for email evolution: privacy-preserving protocols, better interoperability, offline-first clients, and smarter automation. It discusses how federated infrastructure and anti-spam innovations might shape next-gen email experiences.
items.summary_zh: 展望电子邮件的演进方向：隐私保护协议、互操作性提升、离线优先的客户端，以及更智能的自动化。探讨分布式基础设施与反垃圾邮件技术如何塑造下一代邮件体验。

items.title_en: It's death
items.title_zh: 这是死亡
items.summary_en: The post bluntly declares that a topic is dead, signaling a stark verdict on its viability. It serves as a provocative take that may reflect a broader fatigue or pivot away from a once-promising idea.
items.summary_zh: 该帖直言某个话题已死，发出对其可行性的明确断言。这是一种挑衅性观点，或反映对曾经有前景的方向的疲惫或转变。

items.title_en: Sequoyah’s syllabary created a written language for the Cherokee
items.title_zh: Sequoyah 的音节字母为切罗基创造了书写语言
items.summary_en: Sequoyah's Cherokee syllabary enabled a lasting literate culture among the Cherokee, accelerating governance, education, and record-keeping. The invention shows how a writing system can catalyze political resilience and cultural preservation under pressure.
items.summary_zh: Sequoyah 的切罗基音节字母让切罗基人建立了持续的书写传统，推动治理、教育与档案管理。这个发明展示了书写体系如何在压力下推动政治韧性与文化传承。

items.title_en: Notes on DeepSeek
items.title_zh: 关于 DeepSeek 的笔记
items.summary_en: Notes on DeepSeek—likely a new AI-powered search or data platform—covering design decisions, capabilities, and potential use cases in data retrieval or AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 对 DeepSeek 的观察与思考，讨论其设计、能力及在数据检索或 AI 工作流中的潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gravity – Interactive solar-system simulator, from Newton to Einstein
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gravity——交互式太阳系模拟器，覆盖从牛顿到爱因斯坦
items.summary_en: Gravity is an interactive solar-system simulator that runs in the browser, letting users explore physics from Newtonian gravity to relativistic effects. It serves as an accessible educational tool and a demonstration of real-time physics rendering.
items.summary_zh: Gravity 是一个在浏览器中运行的交互式太阳系模拟器，用户可以直观体验从牛顿力学到相对论效应的物理。它兼具教育用途与实时物理渲染演示价值。

items.title_en: Thi.ng – open-source building blocks for computational design and art
items.title_zh: Thi.ng：用于计算设计与艺术的开源组件
items.summary_en: Thi.ng provides open-source building blocks for computational design and art, offering modular, interoperable components to compose generative visuals, sonic art, and data-driven graphics. It's a versatile toolkit for artists and developers exploring creative coding.
items.summary_zh: Thi.ng 提供用于计算设计与艺术的开源构件，模块化、可组合，能够拼装生成式视觉、声音艺术和数据可视化等工作流。为艺术家与开发者在创意编码领域提供了灵活的工具箱。

items.title_en: Vitamin D3 During Pregnancy and Cognitive Performance at 10 Years
items.title_zh: 孕期维生素D3与儿童10岁认知表现的研究
items.summary_en: A study examines whether Vitamin D3 supplementation during pregnancy correlates with children's cognitive performance at age 10, contributing evidence to prenatal nutrition debates. While not proving causation, findings may inform guidelines on vitamin D intake during pregnancy and potential long-term neurodevelopmental effects.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究评估孕期维生素D3补充是否与儿童10岁时的认知表现相关，为产前营养讨论提供证据。结果并非因果证明，但可能为孕期维生素D补充指南及潜在的长期神经发育影响提供参考。

items.title_en: MapComplete: Maps about various topics which you can contribute to
items.title_zh: MapComplete：可由社区贡献的多主题地图
items.summary_en: MapComplete hosts a collection of topic-specific maps that the community can contribute to, expanding open data visualization. It lowers barriers for collaborative mapping across sciences, culture, and society, enabling rapid crowd-sourced insights. The project signals a growing trend toward community-built knowledge graphs and maps.
items.summary_zh: MapComplete 汇聚了可由社区贡献的主题地图，推动开放数据可视化的协作。它降低了跨学科、跨领域的地图创建门槛，让众包信息转化为可视化洞见。此举体现了社群驱动的知识地图的日益兴起。

items.title_en: Pac-Man, but you're the ghost
items.title_zh: 吃豆人：你来扮演鬼魂
items.summary_en: Reimagines Pac-Man by letting players control the pursuing ghost, flipping the usual chase dynamics. It highlights how changing the player's role can illuminate core tropes of classic arcade design.
items.summary_zh: 把吃豆人游戏反向设定成玩家扮演追逐者的幽灵，颠覆了传统的追逐规则。介绍了新的机制、关卡设计，以及这一改动对策略和跑分潜力的影响。通过改变玩家角色来揭示经典街机设计的核心要素。

items.title_en: The state of building user interfaces in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 构建用户界面的现状
items.summary_en: The Rust UI scene is growing but still lacks a single dominant framework. Projects like egui, Dioxus, Iced, and GTK bindings push forward, yet tradeoffs around portability, ergonomics, and performance persist. The landscape matters for developers evaluating Rust for front-end or tool UIs.
items.summary_zh: Rust 构建用户界面的生态正在发展，但尚未出现一个主导的框架。诸如 egui、Dioxus、Iced 与 GTK 绑定等项目持续推进，但在可移植性、易用性与性能之间仍存在权衡。对于评估在前端或工具 UI 中使用 Rust 的开发者来说，这一生态格局很关键。

items.title_en: A 'cold blob' in the Atlantic could be a sign of AMOC shutdown
items.title_zh: 大西洋出现‘冷斑’，可能预示 AMOC 关闭
items.summary_en: Reports a cold blob in the North Atlantic that could signal a slowdown of the Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation, with climate implications for weather patterns and sea levels.
items.summary_zh: 北大西洋出现“冷斑”现象，可能预示大西洋环流减弱，涉及天气模式和海平面等气候影响。

items.title_en: Phoenix LiveView 1.2
items.title_zh: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 发布
items.summary_en: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 continues the trend of building rich, real-time UIs with minimal client-side JS by focusing on stability and API enhancements. The release makes server-rendered interactivity more maintainable for Elixir teams, helping dashboards and live features ship faster.
items.summary_zh: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 继续推动服务器端渲染的实时 UI，强调稳定性和 API 的改进，使前端工作量下降、后端可用性提升。此次更新为使用 Elixir 构建交互式仪表板和实时功能的团队带来更易维护的工具与更快的迭代速度。

items.title_en: Why SpaceX 2040 Revenue FCST $4.3T in highly unlikely
items.title_zh: SpaceX 2040 年收入预测达 4.3 万亿美元几乎不可能
items.summary_en: The article deconstructs SpaceX's optimistic 2040 revenue forecast of $4.3 trillion, questioning assumptions about launch demand, Starlink monetization, and regulatory timelines. It argues that such rosy projections are unlikely and advises caution for investors modeling SpaceX’s growth.
items.summary_zh: 文章对 SpaceX 到 2040 年4.3万亿美元的收入预测进行了拆解，质疑对发射需求、星链盈利与监管时间表等假设的乐观性。结论是此类乐观预测极不可能实现，提醒投资者在估值模型中采用更保守的前提。

items.title_en: Shepherd's Dog: A Game by Fable
items.title_zh: Fable 的游戏《Shepherd's Dog》
items.summary_en: Shepherd's Dog from Studio Fable appears to be an indie, narrative-focused game, signaling the ongoing vitality of experimental storytelling in small teams. It highlights how indie titles continue to push inventive gameplay concepts.
items.summary_zh: Fable 工作室的独立游戏《Shepherd's Dog》似乎是一款以叙事为核心的实验性作品，展示小团队在独立游戏领域持续推动创新玩法。

items.title_en: A dumpster arrived behind my university's library
items.title_zh: 校园图书馆后面的垃圾箱
items.summary_en: A dumpster behind a university library becomes a lens on how digital access is changing libraries and the fate of physical books. The piece questions whether mass digitization and disposal practices threaten the cultural value and longevity of printed works.
items.summary_zh: 一辆垃圾箱落在校园图书馆后院，成为探讨数字化如何改变图书馆及纸质书命运的隐喻。文章质疑大规模数字化与处置是否会削弱纸质书的文化价值与长期保存。

items.title_en: I Hate (Most) Keyboard 'Fn' Keys
items.title_zh: 我讨厌（大多数）键盘 Fn 键
items.summary_en: Fn keys are often poorly designed and inconsistent across devices, complicating daily productivity. The piece calls for easier customization, better defaults, and more intuitive keyboard ergonomics to improve the user experience. It argues for rethinking how manufacturers implement Fn keys.
items.summary_zh: Fn 键在大量设备上设计常常不理想且缺乏一致性，影响日常生产力。文章倡导更易自定义、默认设置更直观，以及改善键盘的人机工程学，以提升使用体验，并呼吁厂商重新考虑 Fn 键的实现方式。

items.title_en: The iPhone's Last Stand?
items.title_zh: iPhone 的最后防线
items.summary_en: The iPhone's Last Stand
items.summary_zh: 作者认为随着监管、竞争与生态系统压力加剧，iPhone 的市场地位面临挑战，文章分析硬件收入依赖的风险，并建议通过服务或生态系统多元化来维持长期竞争力。

items.title_en: Fully autonomous drones have killed human soldiers for the first time
items.title_zh: 全自动无人机首次击杀人类士兵
items.summary_en: Fully autonomous drones have killed human soldiers for the first time, raising urgent ethical, legal, and strategic questions about the deployment of fully autonomous weapons.
items.summary_zh: 完全自主无人机首次致使士兵死亡，引发关于自治武器部署的伦理、法律与战略层面的紧迫讨论。

items.title_en: Why are so many young people getting cancer?
items.title_zh: 为什么如此多的年轻人患癌？
items.summary_en: Nature reports rising cancer rates among young people, prompting questions about environmental, lifestyle, and genetic factors. The article emphasizes the need for more research into causes, early detection, and equitable access to care. It underscores that the trend has broad implications for health tech and policy.
items.summary_zh: Nature 报道显示年轻人中的癌症发病率在上升，引发关于环境、生活方式与遗传因素的讨论。文章强调需要更多研究来揭示病因、推进早期检测并确保公平的治疗机会。这一趋势对健康科技与公共政策具有广泛影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I am building a map of people who lived in the Roman Empire
items.title_zh: Show HN：我在建立一张居住在罗马帝国时期的人的地图
items.summary_en: A hobbyist project maps historical figures to places in the Roman Empire, using historical records to visualize ancient demographics. The effort demonstrates crowdsourcing, data visualization, and ongoing data curation with potential value for historians and educators, while raising questions about source quality and representation.
items.summary_zh: 一个爱好者项目尝试把历史人物与罗马帝国时期的居住地点对应起来，通过历史记录可视化古代人口分布。该工作展示了众包、数据可视化与持续的数据整理在历史教育与研究中的潜在价值，同时也引发对数据源质量与表示方式的讨论。

items.title_en: Buy a train, bridge or tracks from the Swiss Railway
items.title_zh: 从瑞士铁路买火车、桥梁或轨道
items.summary_en: SBB resale program lets buyers purchase former trains, bridges, or tracks from Swiss Railways; unusual heritage or infrastructure projects may emerge.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士铁路推出资产再销售计划，出售包括列车、桥梁与轨道等历史资产，面向个人或机构买家，适合开展独特的硬件或基础设施项目，但需注意合规与安全。

items.title_en: How Terry Tao became an evangelist for AI in math
items.title_zh: 田立 Tao 如何成为 AI 在数学中的倡导者
items.summary_en: Terence Tao has become an evangelist for applying AI in mathematics, exploring how AI can assist proof search, conjecture generation, and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 特里斯·陶教授已成为在数学领域推广 AI 的倡导者，探讨 AI 如何帮助证明搜索、猜想生成与协作。

items.title_en: Federal judge blocks H1B visa $100K fee
items.title_zh: 联邦法官阻止 H1B 签证 10 万美元费用
items.summary_en: A federal judge blocked a proposed $100,000 H1B visa filing fee, delaying a policy change that would affect tech hiring. The decision highlights tensions between immigration policy reform and workforce needs in tech.
items.summary_zh: 联邦法官阻止了一项关于 H1B 签证申请费 10 万美元的提议，阻滞了可能影响科技招聘的政策变动。这一裁决凸显了移民政策改革与科技行业人力需求之间的博弈。

items.title_en: More Molly Guards
items.title_zh: 更多 Molly 护卫
items.summary_en: Additional coverage of Molly guards.
items.summary_zh: 对 Molly 护卫的进一步报道。

items.title_en: Removing 'um' from a recording is harder than it sounds
items.title_zh: 将“嗯”等口头语从录音中删除比想象的要难
items.summary_en: A local CLI tool offers to strip filler words like um/uh/er from speech, but achieving natural-sounding removal without distorting cadence is surprisingly hard. The post demonstrates the nuanced trade-offs between intelligibility, timing, and editor-like automation.
items.summary_zh: 一个本地命令行工具尝试从语音中去除口头填充词如“嗯/啊/呃”，但在不破坏语速与自然感的情况下实现完全去除却相当困难。文中展示了可理解性、节奏感与编辑式自动化之间的细微取舍。

items.title_en: Policy on the AI Exponential
items.title_zh: 关于 AI 指数增长的政策
items.summary_en: Argues for proactive governance as AI capabilities accelerate, stressing safety, alignment, and risk management at scale. It outlines practical policy ideas to guide responsible development without stifling innovation.
items.summary_zh: 主张在 AI 能力快速提升的背景下进行前瞻性治理，强调安全、对齐与大规模风险管理。提出在不扼杀创新的前提下引导负责任发展的具体政策思路。

items.title_en: Web Browsers on Video Game Consoles
items.title_zh: 电子游戏主机上的网页浏览器
items.summary_en: An overview of running web browsers on game consoles, highlighting constraints such as sandboxing, memory limits, and performance trade-offs. It discusses how browser experiences on consoles differ from desktop and mobile, and why this matters for web apps and standards on constrained devices.
items.summary_zh: 概述在游戏主机上运行网页浏览器的情况，强调沙箱、安全、内存和性能等约束。比较游戏主机上的浏览体验与桌面/移动端的差异，解释这对在受限设备上实现网页应用和网络标准的重要性。

items.title_en: Replies to comments on my "LLMs are eroding my career" post
items.title_zh: 对我《LLMs 正在侵蚀我的职业生涯》一文的评论回复
items.summary_en: Replies add nuance to a heated debate: some commentators warn that LLMs will subsume routine tasks, while others argue they can augment professionals when used as intelligent tools. The thread emphasizes upskilling, specialization, and designing workflows that combine human judgment with AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 回复为激烈辩论增添了细腻观点：部分评论者警告大模型将取代常规任务，而另一些则认为若作为智能工具使用，能提高专业人员的生产力。讨论强调提升技能、专业化，以及设计能将人类判断与 AI 能力结合的工作流程。

items.title_en: Adaptive PDFs
items.title_zh: 自适应概率密度函数
items.summary_en: A technical note on adaptive PDFs discusses how to adjust probability distributions on the fly to improve sampling efficiency and estimation accuracy. It covers algorithms and potential applications in simulations, rendering, and probabilistic modeling, highlighting practical benefits.
items.summary_zh: 这篇技术笔记介绍自适应概率密度函数，讲述如何在运行时动态调整分布以提升采样效率和估计精度。内容涵盖相关算法及在仿真、渲染和概率建模等领域的潜在应用，强调实际收益。

items.title_en: OneDrive data now has an expiry date
items.title_zh: OneDrive 数据现在有到期日期
items.summary_en: Microsoft is rolling out an expiry mechanism for OneDrive data, enabling automatic deletion or renewal rules for files and shared items after a defined period. The change reshapes data lifecycle management, retention policies, and user expectations around what persists in the cloud.
items.summary_zh: 微软开始在 OneDrive 中引入到期机制，允许对文件和共享项设定过期规则，逾期后自动删除或触发续存。此举影响数据生命周期管理、合规策略以及用户对云端数据可持续性的预期。

items.title_en: Formal methods and the future of programming
items.title_zh: 形式化方法与编程的未来
items.summary_en: Discusses how formal methods influence programming practice, verification, and the future of software engineering, weighing rigor against practicality at scale.
items.summary_zh: 探讨形式化方法在编程实践、验证和软件工程未来中的作用，权衡严格性与实际可行性。

items.title_en: Porting the ThinkPad X61 to Coreboot
items.title_zh: ThinkPad X61 的 Coreboot 移植
items.summary_en: Porting ThinkPad X61 to Coreboot demonstrates reviving an aging laptop with open firmware, delivering faster boot times and a transparent, auditable BIOS. The project highlights the appeal of open-source firmware for security-conscious users.
items.summary_zh: ThinkPad X61 的 Coreboot 移植展示了用开源固件重活这台老笔记本，提升开机速度并获得可审计的 BIOS。该项目凸显了开放固件在安全性和可控性方面的吸引力。

items.title_en: Authentication issues related to API requests
items.title_zh: 与 API 请求相关的认证问题
items.summary_en: Reports authentication failures affecting API clients, with 401s and token issues causing disrupted workflows. The note explains ongoing fixes and urges developers to refresh credentials and retry after updates, highlighting the fragility of token-based systems.
items.summary_zh: 记录 API 客户端遭遇的认证失败，导致工作流中断及 401 错误。更新指引提及正在修复并建议开发者在更新后刷新凭证并重试，凸显基于令牌的认证系统的脆弱性。

items.title_en: A Matter Wi-Fi Light Bulb in Rust on the Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W
items.title_zh: Matter Wi-Fi 灯泡：在 Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W 上用 Rust 实现
items.summary_en: Demonstrates building a Matter-enabled Wi‑Fi light bulb using Rust on the Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W, showcasing a secure, memory-safe IoT path. It highlights how Rust and open standards can simplify building reliable smart home devices on tiny microcontrollers.
items.summary_zh: 展示在 Raspberry Pi Pico 2 W 上用 Rust 构建符合 Matter 标准的 Wi‑Fi 灯泡，体现了一个安全、内存安全的物联网实现路径。该项目展示了 Rust 与开源标准如何简化在微控制器上开发可靠的智能家居设备。

items.title_en: Apple didn't revolutionize power supplies; new transistors did (2012)
items.title_zh: 苹果没有彻底改变电源供应；新晶体管才是关键
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the real driver behind modern efficiency gains isn’t design of power supplies per se, but advances in transistor technology. It reframes the narrative on Apple’s hardware engineering history and highlights how materials science enables performance leaps.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为现代效率提升的真正驱动并非电源设计本身，而是晶体管技术的进步。它重新审视了苹果硬件工程的叙事，强调材料科学如何驱动性能跃升。

items.title_en: Appreciating Exif
items.title_zh: 欣赏 Exif 数据
items.summary_en: Exif metadata often goes overlooked despite its practical value for organizing, debugging, and tracing image provenance.
items.summary_zh: Exif 元数据在组织、调试和追踪图片来源方面极具实用价值，但常被忽视。本文强调元数据如何丰富照片信息，以及随之而来的隐私考量。

items.title_en: OCaml Onboarding: Introduction to the Dune build system
items.title_zh: OCaml 入门：Dune 构建系统导览
items.summary_en: Dune is the de facto build system for OCaml projects, handling dependencies, builds, and packaging with sensible defaults. This onboarding guide helps newcomers set up projects quickly and learn best practices for reproducible builds.
items.summary_zh: Dune 是 OCaml 的事实标准构建系统，负责依赖、构建和打包。这份入门指南帮助新手快速搭建项目，并学习可重复构建的最佳实践。

items.title_en: Why are cells small?
items.title_zh: 细胞为什么要小
items.summary_en: The piece explains physical and energetic limits that keep cells small, focusing on surface-to-volume ratio and nutrient diffusion. It links these constraints to cellular organization and efficiency trade-offs in biology.
items.summary_zh: 本文解释限制细胞大小的物理与能量约束，聚焦表面积与体积比对养分交换的影响以及扩散过程。将这些约束放在细胞组织与代谢效率的更大框架中，说明生物在效率与复杂性之间的取舍。

items.title_en: Show HN: Paca – Lightweight Jira alternative for human-AI collaboration
items.title_zh: Show HN：Paca——面向人机协作的轻量级 Jira 替代品
items.summary_en: Paca introduces a lightweight Jira alternative tailored for human-AI collaboration, simplifying issue tracking while enabling AI-assisted workflows. The project aims to reduce setup friction and empower teams to work with AI copilots without heavy infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Paca 提供一个面向人机协作的轻量级 Jira 替代方案，简化问题跟踪并支持 AI 辅助工作流。该项目意在降低上手成本，使团队在无需繁重基础设施的情况下与 AI 助手协同工作。

items.title_en: Pyodide 314.0: Python packages can now publish WebAssembly wheels to PyPI
items.title_zh: Pyodide 314.0：Python 包现在可将 WebAssembly wheel 发布到 PyPI
items.summary_en: Pyodide 314.0 enables Python packages to publish WebAssembly wheels directly to PyPI, lowering the barrier for running Python in the browser and on edge environments. By standardizing WASM wheels, developers can distribute browser-ready Python code alongside native wheels, accelerating web-based Python apps and computational notebooks. Expect changes to packaging workflows, compatibility considerations, and potential security tradeoffs when shipping browser-optimized Python.
items.summary_zh: Pyodide 314.0 现已支持将 WebAssembly wheel 直接发布到 PyPI，降低在浏览器和边缘环境中运行 Python 的门槛。标准化 WASM wheel 让开发者能够把浏览器就绪的 Python 代码与原生轮子一同分发，加速网页端 Python 应用和计算笔记本的部署。这一举措也将带来打包流程、兼容性与在浏览器中执行的安全性权衡。

items.title_en: Are you expected to run five Python type-checkers now?
items.title_zh: 现在是不是得同时运行五个 Python 类型检查器？
items.summary_en: An exploration of Python's type-checking ecosystem, questioning whether the community has become bloated with multiple checkers and proposing strategies for standardization or better interoperability. It highlights tradeoffs between type safety, velocity, and tool complexity.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Python 类型检查工具生态的探讨质疑社区是否被多种检查器所堆叠，提出标准化或更好互操作性的策略。强调类型安全、开发速度与工具复杂性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: A jacket that harvests drinking water from the air
items.title_zh: 从空气中提取饮用水的夹克
items.summary_en: Researchers unveiled a wearable jacket that harvests drinking water from the air, enabling hydration in dry environments. It showcases practical, portable water generation technology with potential humanitarian and disaster-response applications, though scaling and energy use remain open questions.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发的可穿戴夹克能从空气中凝结水分，提供饮用水，适合干旱地区和救灾场景。该技术展示了便携式水源获取的潜力，但在能效和大规模应用方面仍有挑战。

items.title_en: Swiss voters reject proposal to cap population at ten million
items.title_zh: 瑞士选民否决将人口上限设为一千万的提案
items.summary_en: Swiss voters rejected a proposal to cap the population at 10 million, underscoring skepticism toward hard demographic limits. The outcome shapes ongoing debates around immigration and urban planning.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士选民否决将人口上限设为一千万的提案，体现了对硬性人口限制的怀疑。此结果将影响移民与城市规划的长期辩论。

items.title_en: Vinyl succumbs to Loudness War: more than just collateral damage (2025)
items.title_zh: 黑胶在响度战争中屈服（2025）
items.summary_en: Vinyl is feeling the effects of the loudness war, as mastering trends push for louder tracks on vinyl pressings. That pressure erodes dynamic range and archival quality, and the piece frames it as more than cosmetic damage by highlighting long-term listening experience and market dynamics. It also calls for preserving dynamics and exploring mastering approaches tailored for vinyl to minimize collateral damage.
items.summary_zh: 本文指出黑胶唱片正在受响度战争影响，母带制作趋向更大音量和压缩，削弱动态范围。此现象不仅影响即时聆听，也危及长期存档与真实音色的再现。文章呼吁更重视保留动态范围，并探索适合黑胶的母带策略，以减少对音质的损害。

items.title_en: Show HN: HelixDB – A graph database built on object storage
items.title_zh: Show HN：HelixDB——一个建立在对象存储上的图数据库
items.summary_en: HelixDB is a graph database designed atop object storage, offering scalable, cost-effective graph workloads by decoupling storage from compute. It explores data model, indexing strategies, and performance trade-offs, highlighting a novel architecture for graphs at scale.
items.summary_zh: HelixDB 是一个建立在对象存储之上的图数据库，通过将存储与计算分离实现可扩展、成本友好的图工作负载。文章探讨数据模型、索引策略与性能权衡，呈现适用于大规模图数据的新架构。

items.title_en: Lies we tell ourselves about email addresses
items.title_zh: 关于邮箱地址的谎言
items.summary_en: The piece challenges prevalent beliefs about email addresses, such as the significance of domain choices and aliasing, and offers practical takeaways for developers and operators managing mail flows.
items.summary_zh: 本文质疑关于邮箱地址的常见观念，如域名选择与别名的意义，并为开发者与运维提供管理邮件流的实用要点。

items.title_en: Looking Forward to Postgres 19: It's About Time
items.title_zh: 展望 PostgreSQL 19：正是时候
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL 19 is teased with improvements around time handling and performance, signaling the database's ongoing evolution to support modern workloads. The article notes expectations for faster queries, better tooling, and improved compatibility for large-scale deployments.
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 19 预期在时间处理和性能方面带来改进，显示数据库在满足现代工作负载方面的持续演进。文章提及对更快的查询、改进的工具链以及对大规模部署的兼容性提升等预期。

items.title_en: Old'aVista – The most powerful guide to the old Internet
items.title_zh: Old'aVista——最强大的旧互联网指南
items.summary_en: Old'aVista curates a comprehensive guide to the old Internet, collecting vintage sites and artifacts. It offers historical context for how the Web evolved and practical pointers for building retro experiences.
items.summary_zh: Old'aVista 汇集了旧互联网的经典站点和工具，为研究早期网页演变提供线索。它既是怀旧指南，也是理解互联网如何发展、并为复古项目提供参考的资源。

items.title_en: Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search
items.title_zh: Grep 就是你要的吗？Agent Harness 重塑面向代理的搜索
items.summary_en: A discussion of how Agent Harness and similar tool-using agents rely on simple primitives like grep to perform search and tool calls, arguing that such building blocks can redefine agentic search. The piece analyzes architecture trade-offs and implications for reliability and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 讨论了 Agent Harness 等工具型代理如何依赖像 grep 这样的简单原语来执行搜索和工具调用，认为这些基本构件可以重新定义代理驱动的搜索。文章分析了架构权衡及对可靠性和效率的影响。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Are you still using a Vision Pro?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你还在使用 Vision Pro 吗？
items.summary_en: Are you still using Vision Pro? A pulse-check on adoption, use cases, and the developer ecosystem, revealing how people weigh comfort, price, and content when evaluating AR/VR headsets.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN：你还在使用 Vision Pro 吗？讨论包含使用场景、生态和设备的可行性。社区分享了佩戴舒适度、价格、续航等方面的看法，以及开发者生态的进展。

items.title_en: FreeOberon – Open-Source, Cross-Platform, Free Pascal/Turbo Pascal-Like Language
items.title_zh: FreeOberon：开源、跨平台的 Oberon 风格语言
items.summary_en: FreeOberon presents an open-source, cross-platform take on the Oberon language, offering Pascal-like syntax and a compact toolchain. It aims to rekindle interest in language design from the Niklaus Wirth era while staying usable on modern systems. The project is of interest to language designers and hobbyists exploring minimal, robust toolchains.
items.summary_zh: FreeOberon 提供开源、跨平台的 Oberon 语言实现，保留 Pascal 风格的语法与紧凑的工具链。旨在唤起人们对尼古拉斯·沃尔特时代语言设计的兴趣，同时在现代系统上保持可用。对于语言设计者和热衷于极简且稳健工具链的爱好者有一定吸引力。

items.title_en: Caddy compatibility for zeroserve: 3x throughput and 70% lower latency
items.title_zh: Caddy 与 zeroserve 的兼容性提升：吞吐量提升三倍、延迟降低 70%
items.summary_en: Claims a compatibility setup where Caddy enables zeroserve to achieve roughly 3x throughput and 70% lower latency, with notes on how to configure and optimize.
items.summary_zh: 文中描述了 Caddy 与 zeroserve 搭配时带来的性能提升，吞吐量提升约 3 倍、延迟降低约 70%，并给出相关配置要点。

items.title_en: The oldest surviving animated feature film at 100
items.title_zh: 百年之作：世界上现存最早的长篇动画片
items.summary_en: On the 100th anniversary of The Adventures of Prince Achmed (1926), the world's oldest surviving feature-length animated film, the piece highlights Lotte Reiniger's pioneering silhouette animation and its enduring influence on cinema.
items.summary_zh: 庆祝《 Prince Achmed 的冒险》（1926）成为现存最早的长篇动画片一百周年，文章回顾路特·赖尼格尔的剪影动画及其对电影史的深远影响。

items.title_en: Grit: Rewriting Git in Rust with agents
items.title_zh: Grit：用 Rust 与代理重写 Git
items.summary_en: Grit aims to rewrite Git in Rust using agents, focusing on performance and safety. The project explores a novel agent-driven approach to VCS tasks, potentially reshaping how developers compose workflows.
items.summary_zh: Grit 将 Git 用 Rust 重写，并引入代理驱动的架构，强调性能提升和安全性。这样的设计可能改变日常工作流的并行任务与扩展性，值得关注对 VCS 的影响。

items.title_en: Playing with Vision Embeddings
items.title_zh: Playing with Vision Embeddings
items.summary_en: Explorations with vision embeddings reveal how visual features can be mapped into embedding spaces, enabling tasks like image retrieval, style transfer, or multimodal learning. The post shares experiments and practical takeaways for practitioners building vision-language systems.
items.summary_zh: 对视觉嵌入进行尝试，展示如何将视觉特征映射到嵌入空间，以实现图片检索、风格迁移或多模态学习等任务。 文中分享实验结果和对构建视觉-语言系统的实用要点。

items.title_en: Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring
items.title_zh: 招聘中的算法单一化问题
items.summary_en: A project argues that automated hiring pipelines can create algorithmic monocultures by over-filtering for narrow signals. It warns of bias amplification and reduced diversity, and advocates for transparent features, human-in-the-loop checks, and diverse training data. The takeaway is to design hiring tools that broaden rather than narrow candidate pools.
items.summary_zh: 该项目指出自动化招聘流程可能通过过度依赖狭窄信号而形成算法性单一化。它警示偏见放大和多样性下降，并主张采用透明特征、人工干预和多样化训练数据。核心要点是让招聘工具拓宽而非缩窄候选人池。

items.title_en: European sunscreens are safer than American (2024)
items.title_zh: 欧洲防晒霜更安全（2024）
items.summary_en: The piece assesses sunscreen regulations, arguing European formulations generally avoid certain problematic ingredients used in the U.S. as of 2024. It discusses regulatory differences, consumer safety implications, and practical tips for choosing safer products.
items.summary_zh: 文章比较欧洲与美国在防晒成分上的监管差异，认为截至2024年欧洲产品通常采用更安全的配方，避免部分美国常用成分。并就如何选购更安全的防晒产品给出建议。

items.title_en: Office-open-xml-viewer: Office XML document viewer that renders to HTML Canvas
items.title_zh: Office Open XML 查看器：将 Office XML 文档渲染到 HTML 画布
items.summary_en: Office Open XML Viewer renders Office documents to HTML Canvas, enabling client-side viewing and interactive rendering without server-side conversion.
items.summary_zh: Office Open XML Viewer 将 Office 文档渲染为 HTML Canvas，支持客户端渲染与互动查看，减少对服务器端转换的依赖。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Why is there some sort of a scam website being advertised on HN?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：为何在 Hacker News 上有广告宣传诈骗网站？
items.summary_en: The post questions why Hacker News displays ads linking to scam sites, highlighting ad-network vetting gaps and the broader risks of online advertising. It calls for stronger controls and transparency around what gets promoted to readers in a free, ad-supported model.
items.summary_zh: 该帖质疑 Hacker News 为什么会投放指向诈骗网站的广告，揭示了广告网络审核的漏洞与在线广告的普遍风险。讨论呼吁在免费、广告支撑的模式下加强推广内容的透明度与管控。

items.title_en: Forever Young: how one molecule can lock plants in a youthful state (2025)
items.title_zh: 永葆青春：一种分子让植物保持年轻状态
items.summary_en: A molecule appears to lock plants in a youthful state, slowing aging in tissues. If scalable, this could boost crop vigor and yields, but practical deployment faces long-term safety, environmental, and regulatory questions.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示一种分子能够让植物保持年轻状态，延缓组织衰老。若能在农业上落地，或提升作物活力和产量，但长期安全性、环境影响与监管问题将是关键挑战。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What are you working on? (June 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在忙什么？（2026 年 6 月）
items.summary_en: A crowd-sourced prompt inviting readers to share what they’re building this month. The thread commonly reveals AI tooling, infrastructure tinkering, side projects, and notable open-source efforts.
items.summary_zh: 这是一次社区征集，邀请读者分享本月正在做的项目。讨论往往暴露出 AI 工具、基础设施尝试、个人项目以及值得关注的开源工作。

items.title_en: Where Did Earth Get Its Oceans? Maybe It Made Them Itself
items.title_zh: 地球的海洋从何而来？也许是地球自己制造的
items.summary_en: Quanta Magazine explores a growing idea that Earth’s oceans may have formed in situ through geochemical processes during accretion, rather than arriving primarily via late delivery by comets. If correct, this reframes the timeline of Earth's habitability and informs how we search for oceans on other worlds.
items.summary_zh: Quanta Magazine 探讨一种日益受关注的观点，即地球的海洋可能是在地球本身逐渐形成的地球化学过程中产生，而非主要通过彗星等晚期送达。若正确，将重新定义地球可居住性时间线，并影响我们在其他天体上寻找海洋的思路。

items.title_en: Maxproof
items.title_zh: Maxproof
items.summary_en: Maxproof proposes a novel approach to proof systems aimed at improving scalability and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: Maxproof 提出一种新的证明系统思路，旨在提升可扩展性与效率。

items.title_en: FPS.cob: A first person shooter in COBOL
items.title_zh: FPS.cob：COBOL 编写的第一人称射击游戏
items.summary_en: FPS.cob demonstrates a fully playable shooter written in COBOL, showcasing language versatility and creative programming feats; it highlights the playful boundaries of programming language ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: FPS.cob 用 COBOL 实现了可玩射击游戏，展示了语言的灵活性与创造性编程的边界。

items.title_en: Cloning a Sennheiser BA2015 battery pack
items.title_zh: 克隆 Sennheiser BA2015 电池组
items.summary_en: Cloning a Sennheiser BA2015 battery pack involves reverse-engineering the cells and protection circuitry to reproduce the pack. It highlights the tension between extending hardware life and ensuring safety.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章聚焦于克隆 Sennheiser BA2015 电池组，涉及对电池组单元、保护电路与外形的逆向分析。内容强调在延长硬件寿命时的安全风险与可行替代方案，并体现黑客精神与实用性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: EV demand up 50% in France and Germany since Iran war
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争以来，法国和德国新能源汽车需求上涨50%
items.summary_en: Renault’s CEO notes EV demand in France and Germany has surged about 50% since the Iran conflict intensified, signaling strong policy and consumer momentum toward electrification in Europe. The spike could tighten EV supply, drive grid and charging infrastructure investments, and reshape the European auto market.
items.summary_zh: 雷诺首席执行官表示，法国和德国的电动汽车需求在伊朗冲突加剧后约上涨50%，反映出欧洲在政策和消费者层面的强劲电气化动能。需求激增可能收紧车型供应、推动充电与电网基础设施投资，并改变欧洲汽车市场格局。

items.title_en: Rio de Janeiro's city government model Rio3.5 beats Qwen3.7 in recent benchmarks
items.title_zh: 里约市政府模型 Rio3.5 在基准测试中超越 Qwen3.7
items.summary_en: Recent benchmarks claim a municipal AI model named Rio3.5 outperforms Qwen3.7, highlighting how local governance AI initiatives can compete with commercial models.
items.summary_zh: 基准测试显示里约市政府的 Rio3.5 模型在某些任务上胜过 Qwen3.7，体现地方治理 AI 项目具备与商业模型竞争的潜力。

items.title_en: A new era for software testing
items.title_zh: 软件测试的新时代
items.summary_en: A new era for software testing emphasizes automated verification, property-based testing, and continuous quality assurance in modern pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 软件测试进入新时代，强调自动化验证、基于属性的测试以及在现代开发管线中的持续质量确保。

items.title_en: Reverse engineering the Creative Katana soundbar to control it from Linux
items.title_zh: 在 Linux 下对 Creative Katana 音响条进行逆向工程以实现控制
items.summary_en: A hands-on account of reverse-engineering a Creative Katana soundbar to gain Linux control, including protocol discovery and driver considerations. It shows how open hardware and community tooling enable custom control beyond what official apps provide.
items.summary_zh: 以动手实践的方式对 Creative Katana 音响条进行逆向工程，以在 Linux 上实现控制，包括协议发现与驱动考虑。展示了开放硬件与社区工具如何实现官方应用之外的自定义控制。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Meta is down
items.title_zh: Tell HN：Meta 服务宕机
items.summary_en: A user reports Meta's services are down, affecting platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp. The outage highlights how a single company's downtime can ripple through global social and commerce channels, underscoring the importance of reliability and resilient fallback options.
items.summary_zh: 用户报告 Meta 的服务宕机，影响 Facebook、Instagram 和 WhatsApp 等平台。此次故障凸显单一公司停机对全球社交与数字经济的连锁影响，也强调提升系统可靠性和弹性备选方案的重要性。

items.title_en: Where is the AI jobs crisis?
items.title_zh: AI 就业危机在哪儿？
items.summary_en: Where is the AI jobs crisis? The piece challenges the idea of a looming shortfall, noting ongoing demand across industries, skill gaps, and the need for retraining and policy support. It suggests that, despite hype, AI roles remain robust and evolving.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑是否真存在 AI 就业危机，指出各行业对 AI 技能的需求持续增长，存在技能缺口与再培训需求。总体观点是 AI 职位需求仍在增长，尚未出现普遍性的危机。

items.title_en: Solar Energy Saves Europeans $135M a Day
items.title_zh: 太阳能每天为欧洲节省1.35亿美元
items.summary_en: Solar energy saves Europeans about $135 million each day by avoiding fuel costs and price volatility. The figure underscores solar's role in energy security and economic resilience as Europe expands its solar capacity.
items.summary_zh: 太阳能每天为欧洲带来约1.35亿美元的节省，来自避免燃料成本和电力价格波动。这一数字凸显太阳能在能源安全和经济韧性中的作用，随着欧洲继续扩大光伏装机。

items.title_en: Full Reverse Engineering of the TI-84 Plus Operating System
items.title_zh: TI-84 Plus 操作系统的全面逆向工程
items.summary_en: A thorough reverse engineering of TI-84 Plus OS uncovers the calculator’s firmware internals, from its file system to app loading and security boundaries. The project energizes retro-computing communities and illustrates how hobbyist reverse engineering keeps classic devices relevant.
items.summary_zh: 对 TI-84 Plus 操作系统进行的全面逆向工程，揭示计算器固件的内部工作原理、文件系统、应用加载与安全边界。这类工作推动复古计算社区，也显示了经典硬件的长期可维护性。

items.title_en: The adder at the heart of Intel's 8087 floating-point chip
items.title_zh: 英特尔 8087 浮点芯片核心加法器
items.summary_en: A reverse-engineering look at the adder inside Intel's 8087 floating-point unit, revealing how early FP math hardware achieved its performance. It sheds light on vintage CPU design choices.
items.summary_zh: 对英特尔 8087 浮点单元核心加法器进行逆向工程式解析，揭示早期浮点数学硬件如何实现性能，以及当时的设计取舍。

items.title_en: Starfish by Peter Watts (1999)
items.title_zh: 彼得·沃茨的《海星》（1999）
items.summary_en: Peter Watts's Starfish (1999) offers a hard-SF exploration of biotech, consciousness, and post-human ethics. The story probes how enhancement tech and cognition intersect under extreme conditions, prompting reflection on future tech and humanity.
items.summary_zh: 彼得·沃茨的《海星》（1999）以硬科幻笔触探讨生物技术、意识和后人类伦理；在极端情境下，描绘了增强技术与认知的交汇，引发对未来科技与人性的思考。

items.title_en: CSS: Unavoidable Bad Parts
items.title_zh: CSS 的不可避免的坏部分
items.summary_en: CSS has endemic 'bad parts' that designers must learn to work around, from selector specificity to layout quirks. The post argues these design flaws are not mistakes but systemic constraints that require clever patterns and mental models.
items.summary_zh: CSS 存在天生的‘坏部分’，比如选择器的特异性和布局怪癖，往往需要设计者去绕行。文中认为这些缺陷不是错误，而是系统性约束，需要通过巧妙的模式与思维模型来应对。

items.title_en: Test-case reducers are underappreciated debugging tools
items.title_zh: 测试用例缩减工具被低估的调试利器
items.summary_en: Test-case reducers help isolate minimal failing scenarios, dramatically speeding debugging and regression testing. The post surveys practical techniques and real-world examples for trimming test cases without sacrificing reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: 测试用例缩减工具有助于将故障场景缩小到最小可复现的情况，从而显著提升调试和回归测试的效率。文中介绍了实用技巧和真实案例，展示在不牺牲可复现性的前提下如何精简测试用例。

items.title_en: Richard Scolyer Has Died
items.title_zh: 理查德·斯科卢耶去世
items.summary_en: Renowned Australian melanoma pathologist Richard Scolyer has died, leaving a major legacy in cancer genomics and diagnostic pathology. Tributes praise his contributions to melanoma research, international collaborations, and the standardization of diagnostic practices.
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚知名黑素瘤病理学家理查德·斯科卢耶去世，长期致力于癌症基因组学与诊断病理学领域。 各界对他的贡献表示缅怀，肯定他在黑色素瘤研究、国际合作与诊断规范化方面的影响。

items.title_en: Tesla Full Self Driving uses bicycle lane in official Denmark approval video
items.title_zh: 特斯拉全自动驾驶在丹麦批准视频中使用自行车道
items.summary_en: In a Denmark regulatory video, Tesla's Full Self-Driving footage appears to drive in a bicycle lane, with an early error noted around 12 seconds. The clip has sparked scrutiny of demonstration practices for regulatory approvals and raises questions about the gap between marketing demonstrations and real-world safety performance.
items.summary_zh: 在丹麦的监管视频中，特斯拉全自动驾驶的镜头似乎驶入自行车道，并在约12秒处出现了早期错误。这段视频引发对监管审批演示做法的质疑，并提示营销演示与真实路况下的安全表现之间的差距。

items.title_en: Zig Structs of Arrays (2024)
items.title_zh: Zig Struct of Arrays（2024）
items.summary_en: Zig Struct of Arrays (SoA) discusses data-oriented design in Zig, contrasting structures of arrays vs arrays of structures and showing performance benefits for SIMD and cache locality. The post likely includes code patterns and benchmarks for practical adoption.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的 Struct of Arrays（SoA）主题探讨面向数据的设计，对比结构体数组与数组结构体，并展示在 SIMD 与缓存局部性方面的性能优势。 文中可能包含可操作的代码示例与基准。

items.title_en: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
items.title_zh: KPMG 因 AI 出现幻觉现象而撤回报告
items.summary_en: KPMG pulled an AI usage report after concerns about hallucinations in the tool's outputs, underscoring governance and reliability concerns for enterprises deploying AI.
items.summary_zh: KPMG 因 AI 系统出现幻觉现象而撤回相关报告，凸显企业在落地 AI 时对可靠性和治理的担忧。

items.title_en: Podman 6: machine usability improvements (2025)
items.title_zh: Podman 6：机器可用性改进（2025）
items.summary_en: Podman 6 delivers machine usability improvements, simplifying how developers interact with machine-based workflows in the container ecosystem. The update tightens defaults, improves CLI ergonomics, and strengthens rootless operations. It lowers the barrier to productive, daemonless container workloads.
items.summary_zh: Podman 6 对机器相关命令带来可用性改进，简化了上手与生命周期管理，降低非 Root 模式下使用容器的门槛。更新聚焦于提高开发者在日常容器工作流中的效率与自动化能力。

items.title_en: Build a Basic AI Agent from Scratch: Long Task Planning
items.title_zh: 从零开始构建一个基本的 AI 代理：长任务规划
items.summary_en: An approachable, hands-on guide to building a simple AI agent from scratch, with a focus on long-horizon task planning and goal decomposition. It presents practical patterns for structuring planners, managing state, and handling multi-step tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一本易于上手的实操指南，讲解如何从零开始构建一个简单的 AI 代理，聚焦于长时任务规划与目标分解。文中给出在规划器结构、状态管理以及多步任务处理方面的实用模式。

items.title_en: I replaced Spotify with a homemade FM radio station
items.title_zh: 我用自制的 FM 广播取代了 Spotify
items.summary_en: I swapped Spotify for a homemade FM radio station, embracing local broadcasting and DIY tech tinkering. The move highlights the appeal of DIY, privacy-conscious media versus centralized streaming, and the charm of low-latency, offline-friendly listening.
items.summary_zh: 用自制的 FM 广播取代了 Spotify，进行本地化的内容编排与广播。此举体现了 DIY、注重隐私的媒体形态相对于集中式流媒体的吸引力，以及低延迟、可离线收听的乐趣。

items.title_en: A greyscale iPhone setup that works in everyday life
items.title_zh: 日常使用的灰度 iPhone 设置
items.summary_en: Describes a grayscale iPhone setup designed for focus and usability in everyday life, including wallpaper choices, icon layouts, and accessibility tweaks to reduce visual noise.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一套日常使用的灰度模式 iPhone 设置，强调提升专注与可用性，涵盖壁纸、应用图标布局及辅助功能的调整。

items.title_en: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring: Built together, designed for the future
items.title_zh: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring：共建、面向未来
items.summary_en: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring ships with collaborative by-default features and a future-oriented design for self-hosted environments. It emphasizes privacy, interoperability, and community-driven development.
items.summary_zh: Nextcloud Hub 26 Spring 强调默认的协作功能与面向未来的自托管设计，聚焦隐私、互操作性与社区驱动的发展。

items.title_en: Extinction-Level Capitalism
items.title_zh: 灭绝级资本主义
items.summary_en: Matthew Butterick critiques capitalism's systemic risks and ecological costs, arguing for reform to avert existential threats; blends economics and tech policy.
items.summary_zh: Matthew Butterick 讨论资本主义的系统性风险与生态成本，呼吁进行改革以避免存在性威胁，兼顾经济与科技政策的平衡。

items.title_en: An introduction to functional analysis for science and engineering
items.title_zh: 面向科学与工程的泛函分析入门，涵盖向量空间、线性算子、范数及应用
items.summary_en: An introduction to functional analysis for science and engineering, covering spaces, operators, norms, and applications, bridging math theory and computational practice.
items.summary_zh: 面向科学与工程的泛函分析入门，涵盖向量空间、线性算子、范数及其在物理与工程中的应用，帮助将理论与计算实践连接起来。

items.title_en: Spanish traders set the standard for GnuCash database design
items.title_zh: 西班牙交易者为 GnuCash 数据库设计设定标准
items.summary_en: Spanish traders illustrate best practices for GnuCash database design, sharing practical schema choices and accounting workflows that influence open-source finance software design.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙交易者在 GnuCash 数据库设计上树立了实用的标准，分享了具体的模式选择与会计工作流程，对开源金融软件设计有借鉴意义。

items.title_en: Texas grid flags risks as data centers, crypto sites fail voltage tests
items.title_zh: 德州电网警示风险：数据中心与加密矿场在电压测试中失稳
items.summary_en: Texas grid warns of risks as data centers and crypto sites fail voltage tests, highlighting grid reliability concerns amid rising demand from a tech-forward economy.
items.summary_zh: 德州电网发布风险警示，原因是数据中心与加密矿场在电压测试中出现问题，凸显在高需求科技经济背景下的电网可靠性挑战。

items.title_en: Linux latency measurements and compositor tuning
items.title_zh: Linux 延迟测量与合成器调优
items.summary_en: Practical guidance for measuring Linux latency and tuning the Wayland/X compositor to reduce input lag. It covers profiling render paths, frame timing, and adjustments to vsync, buffering, and scheduling to tighten the loop.
items.summary_zh: 提供在 Linux 上测量延迟以及针对 Wayland/X 合成器的调优方法，以降低输入延迟。文章涵盖渲染路径分析、帧时序、vsync、缓冲与调度等要点，帮助提升交互流畅度。

items.title_en: The only scalable delete in Postgres is DROP TABLE
items.title_zh: Postgres 中唯一可扩展的删除操作是 DROP TABLE
items.summary_en: Argues that deleting vast amounts of data in Postgres scales best with dropping tables rather than row-level DELETEs; discusses implications for archival strategies and schema design.
items.summary_zh: 指出在 Postgres 中，海量数据的删除最具可扩展性的做法是 DROP TABLE，而非逐行 DELETE；并探讨归档与模式设计的影响。

items.title_en: Italy's Bending Spoons, owner of AOL and Vimeo, files for Nasdaq IPO
items.title_zh: 意大利公司 Bending Spoons，AOL 与 Vimeo 的拥有者，提交纳斯达克上市申请
items.summary_en: Italy's Bending Spoons, known for owning AOL and Vimeo, files for Nasdaq IPO, illustrating how European software players are seeking U.S. listings amid global capital markets.
items.summary_zh: 意大利公司 Bending Spoons，AOL 与 Vimeo 的所有者，提交在纳斯达克上市的申请，体现欧洲软件企业在全球资本市场寻求美股上市的趋势。

items.title_en: Discovery of Cold War-era rare Eastern Bloc computers in a German hangar
items.title_zh: 在德国机库发现冷战时期稀有的东欧计算机
items.summary_en: Cold War-era rare Eastern Bloc computers found in a German hangar, shedding light on computing history and hardware preservation.
items.summary_zh: 在德国一个机库里发现冷战时期罕见的东方集团计算机，为计算历史与硬件保护提供罕见线索。

items.title_en: Can LLMs Beat Classical Hyperparameter Optimization Algorithms?
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型能否超越经典超参数优化算法？
items.summary_en: Researchers test whether LLMs can outperform classical hyperparameter optimization (HPO) algorithms. Early results show LLMs can propose promising hyperparameter configurations, but reliability and reproducibility remain open questions. If validated, this could influence AutoML workflows by reducing search costs and accelerating experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员评估大型语言模型是否能超越经典超参数优化算法。初步结果显示 LLMs 在给出有前景的超参数配置方面有潜力，但可靠性与可复现性仍待解决。若证实优越性，可能改变 AutoML 的工作流，降低搜索成本、提速实验。

items.title_en: Show HN: GentleOS – A pair of hobby OSes for vintage 32-bit and 16-bit PCs
items.title_zh: Show HN：GentleOS——面向复古32位与16位 PC 的业余操作系统
items.summary_en: GentleOS showcases a pair of hobbyist operating systems for vintage 32-bit and 16-bit PCs. The project demonstrates minimalist OS design and retro computing techniques, offering a hands-on look at kernel, drivers, and tooling for older hardware.
items.summary_zh: GentleOS 展示了两款面向老旧32位与16位 PC 的业余操作系统。这个项目通过极简化的 OS 设计与复古计算技术，展示了内核、驱动和工具链在旧硬件上的实现与学习价值。

items.title_en: Spherical Voronoi Diagram
items.title_zh: 球面 Voronoi 图
items.summary_en: Spherical Voronoi diagrams extend the classic Voronoi concept to curved surfaces, offering insights for geospatial tiling, astronomy, and global data visualization. The post likely showcases interactive examples and practical applications, from mapping to partitioning sensor networks.
items.summary_zh: 球面 Voronoi 图将经典的 Voronoi 分割推广到曲面上，为地理空间切片、天文数据分区与全球可视化提供新视角。 文中可能展示交互示例及在制图、传感器网络划分等方面的应用。

items.title_en: Who's the smartest corvid?
items.title_zh: 谁是最聪明的乌鸦科动物？
items.summary_en: The piece surveys corvid intelligence, arguing certain crow species exhibit impressive problem-solving and tool-use abilities, challenging common assumptions about animal cognition.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理乌鸦科动物的智力，指出某些乌鸦具有出色的问题解决与工具使用能力，挑战对动物认知的常见看法。

items.title_en: Rome Fell and Nobody Noticed
items.title_zh: 罗马的覆灭被人忽视
items.summary_en: A provocative essay argues Rome's decline was gradual and under-the-radar, not a single catastrophe. It draws parallels to how modern institutions can fail to notice creeping decay.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章提出罗马的衰落是一个渐进且常被忽视的过程，并将其与当代机构在慢性衰退中的表现联系起来。

items.title_en: OpenAI mulls slashing prices as it competes with Anthropic for users
items.title_zh: OpenAI 评估降价以对抗 Anthropic 的竞争
items.summary_en: OpenAI weighs price cuts to win market share against Anthropic, signaling a battle over AI access economics. The move could pressure margins but may accelerate user adoption and ecosystem growth.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在权衡降价以抢占 Anthropic 的用户市场，显示出对 AI 入门门槛的经济博弈。降价可能压缩利润率，但有望推动用户增长与生态系统扩展。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Intuned (YC S22) – Build and run reliable browser automations as code
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Intuned（YC S22）— 将可靠的浏览器自动化以代码形式构建并运行
items.summary_en: Intuned enables building and running browser automations as code, improving reliability and reproducibility across environments. As a YC S22 alum, it signals investor interest in programmable browser automation tooling that can be versioned and integrated into CI/CD workflows.
items.summary_zh: Intuned 使浏览器自动化以代码形式构建并运行，提升可重复性并减少环境间的脆弱性。作为 YC S22 的毕业项目，它体现了对可版本化、可集成到 CI/CD 流程中的浏览器自动化工具的投资关注。

items.title_en: Biff.core: system composition for Clojure web apps
items.title_zh: Biff.core：用于 Clojure Web 应用的系统组合框架
items.summary_en: Biff.core offers a system-assembly approach tailored for Clojure web apps, enabling modular composition of services and UI pieces with clear boundaries. The library aims to improve maintainability and predictability in complex apps, potentially speeding up development in the Clojure ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Biff.core 提供面向 Clojure Web 应用的系统组合方法，支持将服务和前端组件模块化拼装，边界清晰。该库旨在提升大型应用的可维护性与可预测性，可能加速 Clojure 生态中的开发进程。

items.title_en: Running DOS on Behringers DDX3216 with a DIY x86-Bios from Scratch
items.title_zh: 用自制 x86 BIOS 在 Behringer DDX3216 上运行 DOS
items.summary_en: Behringer DDX3216 is repurposed to run DOS via a DIY x86 BIOS built from scratch. This showcases creative hardware hacking to unlock legacy software on consumer gear.
items.summary_zh: 通过自制的原生 x86 BIOS 将 Behringer DDX3216 转用来运行 DOS，展示了如何用硬件黑客精神让普通设备运行遗留软件。

items.title_en: Introduction to UEFI HTTP(s) Boot with QEMU/OVMF
items.title_zh: 通过 QEMU/OVMF 的 UEFI HTTP(S) 引导入门
items.summary_en: The post explains how to boot a virtual machine with UEFI over HTTP(S) using QEMU and OVMF, enabling network boot for VMs. It covers setup steps, secure HTTP boot considerations, and how this workflow can simplify deployment or testing of OS images.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍如何在 QEMU/OVMF 下通过 HTTP(S) 引导虚拟机，实现网络引导的工作流。内容覆盖设置步骤、网络引导的安全性考量，以及在自动化测试和部署中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Who Runs Your Rust Future? Hands-On Intro to Async Rust
items.title_zh: 谁在掌控你的 Rust 未来？Async Rust 入门实战
items.summary_en: A practical, hands-on guide to async Rust, covering futures, await, and concurrency patterns. It helps developers write scalable, efficient Rust code beyond theory.
items.summary_zh: 一本面向初学者的 Async Rust 实战指南，讲解 futures、async/await 和并发模式，帮助开发者写出可扩展、性能更优的 Rust 代码。

items.title_en: Report on an Unidentified Space Station – J.G. Ballard (1982)
items.title_zh: 未识别太空站的报告
items.summary_en: The report examines evidence around an unidentified space station and the challenges of confirming it, including tracking, orbital data uncertainties, and observational signatures. It discusses implications for space situational awareness and scientific catalogs, and highlights how such cases test cooperation among agencies and the reliability of early-warning signals.
items.summary_zh: 该报告探讨了有关未识别太空站的证据与确认难题，包括跟踪、轨道数据的不确定性以及观测信号。它讨论此类事件对太空态势感知与科学目录的影响，并强调各机构协作与早期预警系统在此类情景中的作用与挑战。

items.title_en: Automating myself out of development
items.title_zh: 用自动化把自己从开发工作中解放出来
items.summary_en: A thoughtful essay on automating repetitive development tasks, workflows, and decision processes to reduce manual coding. It discusses the right balance of automation, tool-building, and human oversight, plus lessons learned from trying to automate 'everything'. The piece serves as a pragmatic guide for engineers embracing productivity automation.
items.summary_zh: 作者讨论通过自动化来减少开发中的重复性工作与决策步骤。结合工具链与自动化实践，强调人机协作与适度的监督。为拥抱生产力自动化的工程师提供务实经验与教训。

items.title_en: Life is too short for a slow terminal
items.title_zh: 生活太短，慢速终端不可忍
items.summary_en: A personal take urging developers to optimize their terminal and tooling for speed, with recommendations for faster shells, fonts, and workflows. The piece emphasizes user experience and the compounding benefits of a snappier dev workflow.
items.summary_zh: 作者呼吁开发者优化终端与工具以提升速度，提出更快的 shell、字体和工作流的建议。强调用户体验的重要性，以及更高效的开发流程带来的叠加收益。

items.title_en: Alpine Linux 3.24.0 Released
items.title_zh: Alpine Linux 3.24.0 发布
items.summary_en: Alpine Linux 3.24.0 ships with package updates and security patches, improving container-oriented workflows and system stability. Expect updated libraries and potential upgrade considerations for compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Alpine Linux 3.24.0 已发布，包含软件包更新与安全修复，改善容器工作流和系统稳定性。新版本可能涉及 musl、内核及镜像尺寸等方面的改进，升级时需关注兼容性。

items.title_en: I thought I knew how electrolysis worked [video]
items.title_zh: 我以为自己知道电解是怎么运作的 [视频]
items.summary_en: A short video challenges conventional explanations of electrolysis, offering a clearer, intuitive depiction of the chemistry and setup. It helps demystify common misconceptions and makes the topic accessible for students and hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: 一段短视频挑战了对电解原理的传统理解，给出更清晰、直观的化学过程和实验装置示意，帮助纠正常见误解，并让学生和爱好者更易理解这一主题。

items.title_en: Flat Datacenter Networks at Scale at Amazon
items.title_zh: 大规模数据中心的扁平化网络（亚马逊）
items.summary_en: Amazon describes a flat datacenter network design used to scale efficiently, reduce latency, and simplify operations across massive facilities. The architecture emphasizes uniform fabrics and large-scale routing to deliver predictable performance at scale.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊描述了一种扁平化数据中心网络设计，旨在高效扩展、降低延迟并简化大规模设施的运维。该架构强调统一的网络织物与大规模路由，以在大规模环境中提供可预测的性能。

items.title_en: Orthodox C++ (2016)
items.title_zh: 正统的 C++
items.summary_en: A call for robust, traditional C++ practices, emphasizing correctness, performance predictability, and disciplined language use over hype. The piece offers practical guidelines and cautions against over-fancy solutions that erode readability and reliability.
items.summary_zh: 倡导稳健、传统的 C++ 编程实践，强调正确性、性能可预测性以及对语言的克制使用，警惕追逐新花哨特性而损害可读性和可靠性的趋势。文中给出实际的指导要点并提出相关警示。

items.title_en: 7.8 magnitude earthquake shakes part of southern Philippines. Tsunami possible
items.title_zh: 菲律宾南部发生7.8级地震，可能引发海啸
items.summary_en: An offshore earthquake of magnitude 7.8 rattled southern Philippines, with a tsunami alert possibly issued; authorities urged evacuations and monitoring for aftershocks.
items.summary_zh: 菲律宾南部发生7.8级地震，可能触发海啸警报。当地机构已发出撤离和继续监测余震的指示。

items.title_en: Travel locally, where you are
items.title_zh: 就地出行：在你所在的地方
items.summary_en: Focus travel decisions around your current location and nearby options, leveraging local knowledge and constraints.
items.summary_zh: 将出行决策聚焦在你当前所在的位置及周边选项，利用本地信息与条件。

items.title_en: Backrest – a web UI and orchestrator for restic backup
items.title_zh: Backrest：restic 备份的网页界面与编排工具
items.summary_en: Backrest provides a web UI and orchestrator for restic backups, making configuration, scheduling, and monitoring easier. It offers a centralized view for multi-host backups and can reduce operational overhead. A practical boost for teams relying on restic in modern workflows.
items.summary_zh: Backrest 提供了一个用于 restic 备份的网页界面和编排工具，简化了配置、调度与监控。它使跨主机的备份管理更加直观，并通过集中式视图提升可靠性与协作效率。对于依赖 restic 的团队而言，能显著降低运维负担。

items.title_en: World Capitals Voronoi
items.title_zh: 世界首都的 Voronoi 图
items.summary_en: Voronoi diagrams partition the world into regions around each capital, illustrating geographic proximity without relying on borders. The visualization makes patterns in global capital placement, highlighting cluster regions and spacing between major hubs.
items.summary_zh: 该作品用 Voronoi 图把世界各首都分区展示出来，每个首都成为一个区域的中心点，边界由最近的首都决定。图像揭示全球首都的分布规律和区域聚集趋势，便于理解地理接近度与影响力。

items.title_en: Spoiling Linux Kernel with "sanctioned" code
items.title_zh: Spoiling Linux Kernel：所谓的“被批准”代码
items.summary_en: A discussion about injecting 'sanctioned' code into the Linux kernel, raising questions about governance, community norms, and security.
items.summary_zh: 关于在 Linux 内核中注入“被批准”的代码的讨论，提出治理、社区规范与安全性方面的问题。

items.title_en: UK set to announce social media ban for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国拟宣布对未满16岁用户的社交媒体使用限制
items.summary_en: UK plans to announce curbs on under-16s’ social media usage, reflecting safety, privacy, and child-protection policy debates with potential enforcement challenges.
items.summary_zh: 英国计划宣布对未满16岁用户的社交媒体使用实施限制，政策焦点在安全、隐私与儿童保护，执行上或面临挑战。

items.title_en: What is it like to be a bat? (1974) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 成为一只蝙蝠是什么感觉？（1974）[PDF]
items.summary_en: Thomas Nagel argues that knowing a bat's physiology doesn't reveal what it is like to be a bat, highlighting the hard problem of consciousness. The paper advances the idea that subjective experience resists reduction to physical descriptions, shaping debates in philosophy of mind and AI ethics.
items.summary_zh: 奈格尔在这篇论文中主张，即使能全面了解蝙蝠的生理，也无法知道它的主观感受是什么。这揭示意识的主观性难以被完全还原为客观物理描述，并影响后续的心智哲学与 AI 伦理讨论。

items.title_en: Making a vintage LLM from scratch
items.title_zh: 从零开始打造一款复古风格的大语言模型
items.summary_en: Documents building a vintage-style LLM from scratch, focusing on data curation, architecture choices, and compute constraints. It shares practical lessons from dataset scaling, training tricks, and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 记录从零开始搭建一款复古风格的大语言模型的过程，聚焦数据整理、架构选择与计算资源约束。分享数据集扩展、训练技巧与评估方面的实用经验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claw Patrol, a security firewall for agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：Claw Patrol——代理的安全防火墙
items.summary_en: Claw Patrol provides a security firewall for agents, enforcing policies and containment in AI agent workflows. It offers practical guardrail enforcement for autonomous systems.
items.summary_zh: Claw Patrol 提供面向代理的安全防火墙，在 AI 代理工作流中执行策略与隔离，展示对自主系统的实际边界管控能力。

items.title_en: FarOutCompany
items.title_zh: FarOutCompany
items.summary_en: A concise look at FarOutCompany and its latest activities.
items.summary_zh: 对 FarOutCompany 的简要介绍及其近期动态。

items.title_en: David Hockney, Who Restored the Human Form to Art, Dies at 88
items.title_zh: 让人体回归艺术的霍克尼去世，享年88岁
items.summary_en: David Hockney, a pivotal figure who reframed how the human form is depicted, has died at 88. His experiments with drawing, painting, photography, and digital media reshaped modern art and influenced generations of artists.
items.summary_zh: 大卫·霍克尼是以重新塑造人体在艺术中的地位而著称的艺术家，如今去世，享年 88 岁。其在绘画、摄影及数字媒介上的探索深刻影响了现代艺术与后续艺术家的创作观。

items.title_en: Exif Smuggling (2025)
items.title_zh: Exif 媒体元数据走私攻击
items.summary_en: Exif Smuggling demonstrates how EXIF metadata can be abused to smuggle payloads or bypass filters. It underscores the need for stringent metadata sanitization in image-handling pipelines and vigilant validation of uploaded media.
items.summary_zh: Exif 媒体元数据走私攻击演示了如何利用 EXIF 元数据携带数据或绕过筛选。提醒在图片处理管线中对元数据进行严格清洗和有效性校验。

items.title_en: Powering up a module from the IBM 604: an electronic calculator from 1948
items.title_zh: 为 IBM 604 的模块上电：1948 年电子计算器的复原之旅
items.summary_en: A hands-on look at powering up a modular unit from the IBM 604, a 1948 vacuum-tube calculator. It covers the challenges of reviving vintage hardware, including high-voltage power supplies and precise on/off sequencing. The project offers a tangible window into the engineering trade-offs that paved the way for later transistorized machines.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章实地讲解如何为 IBM 604 的一个模块上电，展示了1948年真空管计算器的复原难点。内容聚焦高压供电、上电顺序等技术挑战，以及这类早期硬件在设计取舍上的历史教训。通过复原，可以直观感受推动后续晶体管化的工程演进。

items.title_en: /architect: Reduce Fable tokens by 80%, Fable orchestrates/reviews, Codex builds
items.title_zh: architect：将 Fable 令牌减少 80%，Fable 进行编排/评审，Codex 构建
items.summary_en: Proposes a token-reduction strategy for Fable, cutting usage by 80% while preserving functionality. The plan involves orchestration by Fable, review processes, and Codex-driven construction to optimize performance and cost.
items.summary_zh: 提出将 Fable 的令牌使用量减少 80% 的方案，旨在在保持功能的前提下降低成本与提高效率。方案包括与 Fable 的编排/评审协同，以及由 Codex 支持的构建流程。

items.title_en: Global population movements from 1990 to 2023
items.title_zh: 1990-2023 全球人口迁移
items.summary_en: Nature article charts global population movements over 1990-2023, with implications for labor, urbanization, and migration policy.
items.summary_zh: Nature 的研究梳理了1990-2023年全球人口迁移趋势，对劳动力、城市化与移民政策具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
items.title_zh: Meta 借鉴特斯拉，在帐篷中搭建数据中心
items.summary_en: Meta reportedly borrows a tent-based data center approach from Tesla to cut capex and accelerate deployment, signaling a shift toward modular, temporary infrastructure at scale. The approach raises questions about long-term reliability, cooling, and maintenance in hyperscale deployments.
items.summary_zh: Meta 据称借鉴特斯拉的帐篷式数据中心思路，旨在降低资本支出、加速部署，体现出在大规模部署中对模块化、临时基础设施的转向。此举也引发对长期可靠性、冷却与维护成本的讨论。

items.title_en: Smudging the game disc to make speedrunning 'SpongeBob' faster
items.title_zh: 通过抹污游戏光盘让《海绵宝宝》速通更快
items.summary_en: The piece documents a hardware-based trick to speedrun SpongeBob by smudging a game disc; it discusses feasibility, reproducibility, and ethics of hardware exploits in speedrunning.
items.summary_zh: 文章记录通过抹污光盘以提升《海绵宝宝》速通速度的做法，讨论其可行性、可重复性以及在速通领域的道德边界。

items.title_en: Perlisisms (1982)
items.title_zh: Perlisms（1982）
items.summary_en: A collection of Alan Perlis's witty epigrams on programming and software engineering, offering timeless reminders about learning, style, and the craft. The quotes are compact and often paradoxical, useful for thinking differently about code.
items.summary_zh: 收集了 Alan Perlis 的机智格言，聚焦编程与软件工程的学习、风格与工艺。这些短句简洁常带悖论色彩，值得用来重新审视代码的本质。

items.title_en: Python 3.14 garbage collection rigamarole
items.title_zh: Python 3.14 垃圾回收的混乱
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at the changes and tensions around Python 3.14's garbage collection, explaining how the new heuristics impact pause times and memory profiles. It provides practical guidance for tuning performance-sensitive apps and highlights why GC behavior matters for long-running services. The piece helps developers decide when to tighten or loosen GC settings.
items.summary_zh: 深入解读 Python 3.14 垃圾回收的新特性与争议，说明新启发式对暂停时间和内存形态的影响。给出针对性能敏感应用的调优建议，并强调 GC 行为对长期运行服务的重要性。帮助开发者判断何时收紧或放宽 GC 设置。

items.title_en: New privacy frontier: Europe eyes crackdown on smart glasses
items.title_zh: 隐私新前沿：欧洲瞄准打击智能眼镜
items.summary_en: European policymakers are considering stricter privacy rules for smart glasses, addressing recording, consent, and data handling. The move could shape the adoption and design of AR wearables across Europe.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟监管机构正考虑对智能眼镜实施更严格的隐私规则，涵盖录像、同意与数据处理等方面，可能影响欧洲地区增强现实设备的普及与设计。

items.title_en: I'm building a parallel internet, and it's called The Thinnernet
items.title_zh: 我在构建一个平行互联网，名为 The Thinnernet
items.summary_en: The Thinnernet is an effort to build a lightweight, parallel internet focused on resilience, privacy, and decentralization—likely using mesh, p2p, and minimal protocols to bypass centralized infrastructure. The project emphasizes small-footprint services and user control, aiming to work in constrained or censored environments. It’s part of a broader wave of experiments exploring alternatives to today's centralized web.
items.summary_zh: The Thinnernet 旨在构建一个轻量的平行互联网，强调弹性、隐私与去中心化，可能采用网格、点对点和精简协议以绕过集中式基础设施。该项目注重小体量服务与用户控制，适用于受限或受审查的环境。它属于探索当今集中化网络替代方案的实验浪潮。

items.title_en: Yserver: A modern X11 server written in Rust
items.title_zh: Yserver：用 Rust 编写的现代 X11 服务器
items.summary_en: Yserver is a modern X11 server implemented in Rust, aiming for safer memory management and modern API design while staying compatible with X11 clients. It signals interest in rethinking legacy windowing stacks with safer systems languages.
items.summary_zh: Yserver 是一个用 Rust 编写的现代 X11 服务器，旨在实现更安全的内存管理和现代 API，同时保持对 X11 客户端的向后兼容。它体现了用更安全的系统语言重塑传统窗口系统的尝试。

items.title_en: Tectonic: A modernized, complete, self-contained TeX/LaTeX engine
items.title_zh: Tectonic：一个现代化、完整、自包含的 TeX/LaTeX 引擎
items.summary_en: Tectonic is a self-contained TeX/LaTeX engine designed to simplify document typesetting with minimal external dependencies. It integrates fonts and tools, aiming for reliable builds, faster startup, and improved reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Tectonic 是一个自包含的 TeX/LaTeX 引擎，旨在通过最小化外部依赖来简化排版工作。它集成字体与工具，追求更可靠的构建、加快启动并提升可重复性。

items.title_en: My automated doubt development process
items.title_zh: 我的自动化怀疑发展过程
items.summary_en: My automated doubt development process describes a workflow that surfaces or generates doubts during reasoning to curb bias and improve decisions. It outlines how automation can replay scenarios, challenge assumptions, and log doubts for later review. A meta-tool for more disciplined thinking.
items.summary_zh: 作者描述了一种自动化过程，用于在推理中产出或揭示怀疑点，以抵消偏见并提升决策质量。文中可能讲解如何通过自动化重现情景、挑战假设，并将疑问记录以便复盘。

items.title_en: Our response to the US ban on Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.title_zh: 我们对美方禁令对 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的回应
items.summary_en: The post argues for open access, questions regulatory rationale, and outlines steps the team will take, including legal review and user support. It highlights broader implications for AI developers and international collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 作者就美国针对 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的禁令表达立场，质疑监管逻辑并说明团队将采取的应对措施，同时强调此类行动对开发者与跨境协作的影响。

items.title_en: The Case for Free Online Books (2014)
items.title_zh: 在线免费图书的理由（2014）
items.summary_en: A 2014 argument advocating free online access to books, outlining social and educational benefits and strategies for sustainable free distribution.
items.summary_zh: 2014 年的论点主张在线免费获取图书，强调其社会与教育价值，以及实现免费分发的可持续策略。

items.title_en: Car headlights don't have to be this blinding
items.title_zh: 汽车大灯不必如此刺眼
items.summary_en: Advocates for better headlight design with adaptive beams to reduce glare for oncoming drivers, improving nighttime safety.
items.summary_zh: 倡导采用自适应光束的更好大灯设计，以减少对向驾驶员眩光、提升夜间行车安全。

items.title_en: 4 things to know about the new sunscreen ingredient the FDA approved
items.title_zh: FDA 批准的新防晒成分的四大要点
items.summary_en: FDA approves a novel UV-filter ingredient and outlines four key implications: broader protection, safety profile, environmental considerations, and labeling/usage guidance. It situates the ingredient within evolving sunscreen formulations and regulatory processes. Practical notes for consumers and product developers.
items.summary_zh: FDA 批准了一种新的防晒成分，并给出四点关键影响：更广的防护、安全性、环境因素与标签/使用指南。将该成分放在不断演进的防晒配方与监管框架中进行解读。为消费者与产品开发者提供实用要点。

items.title_en: There Is Life Before Main in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 的 main 之前的生活
items.summary_en: It’s a practical guide for advanced Rust users working with embedded or custom runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 文章解读 Rust 程序在 main 之前的启动过程与初始化细节，适用于需要自定义运行时的进阶开发者。

items.title_en: Do we fear the serializable isolation level more than we fear subtle bugs (2024)
items.title_zh: 我们是否更担心可串行化隔离级别，而非微妙的错误？
items.summary_en: Serializable isolation promises correctness but often adds complexity and performance costs that may cause more pain than the rare, subtle bugs it aims to prevent. The piece advocates pragmatic cross-checks, selective isolation, and robust testing to balance safety with practicality.
items.summary_zh: 可串行化隔离级别承诺正确性，但往往带来额外的复杂性与性能成本，反而让少数罕见的微妙错误带来更大痛点。文中倡导务实的并发检测、选择性隔离与充分测试，以实现安全性与实际可行性的平衡。

items.title_en: Klondike Solitaire game for curses in 5k of C
items.title_zh: 用 curses 实现的 Klondike 纸牌游戏仅 5KB 的 C 代码
items.summary_en: A Klondike solitaire implementation in a mere 5 kilobytes of C using curses demonstrates extreme code golf craft. The tiny program packs gameplay, input handling, and rendering into a compact, portable retro-style puzzle.
items.summary_zh: 一个用 curses 实现的 Klondike 纸牌游戏仅用 5KB 的 C 代码，展示了极致代码高尔夫的技艺。这个极小的程序把玩法、输入处理与渲染紧凑地打包在一个可移植的复古风格小型程序里。

items.title_en: Thunderbird Littering My Home
items.title_zh: Thunderbird 在家目录乱丢文件
items.summary_en: Thunderbird is leaving a mess in the home directory, likely through misconfigured caches or data paths.
items.summary_zh: Thunderbird 在家目录中留下大量无用文件，通常与缓存或数据路径配置有关。强调桌面应用应提供清晰的默认数据路径并可配置选项，尤其是邮件客户端。

items.title_en: Show HN: Boo – Screen-style terminal multiplexer built on libghostty
items.title_zh: Show HN：Boo——基于 libghostty 的屏幕风格终端多路复用器
items.summary_en: Boo is a screen-style terminal multiplexer built on libghostty. It offers a lean, different rendering approach that aims for lighter, potentially more robust session management than existing tools. This Show HN spotlights how new libraries can redefine terminal UX and trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Boo 是一个基于 libghostty 的屏幕风格终端多路复用器。它提供了一种更简约、不同的渲染方法，目标是在会话管理上比现有工具更轻量、且潜在更稳健。这次 Show HN 突出了新库如何重新定义终端用户体验与取舍。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Favorite text heavy blogs that are a joy to read?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你最喜欢的文字密集型博客有哪些？
items.summary_en: Readers share favorites of text-heavy blogs that are a joy to read, offering long-form insights and deep dives.
items.summary_zh: 读者分享最喜欢的文字密集型博客，提供长篇深度分析和丰富的洞见。

items.title_en: SVG-Line: Better Status Bars for Emacs – Charlie Holland's Blog
items.title_zh: SVG-Line：为 Emacs 提供更好状态栏
items.summary_en: SVG-Line adds vector-based status bars to Emacs, delivering a crisp, customizable UI win for power users.
items.summary_zh: SVG-Line 为 Emacs 增添矢量化状态栏，为高级用户带来更清晰、可定制的界面提升。

items.title_en: Corrupting a ZFS File on Purpose
items.title_zh: 故意损坏 ZFS 文件
items.summary_en: Corrupting a ZFS File on Purpose
items.summary_zh: 博文演示如何有意损坏 ZFS 文件，揭示 ZFS 数据完整性特性在面对故意破坏时的表现，并讨论如何测试恢复流程。

items.title_en: Tribblix: The retro Illumos distribution
items.title_zh: Tribblix：复古版 Illumos 发行版
items.summary_en: Tribblix resurrects Illumos as a usable, retro-styled distribution, blending OpenSolaris heritage with modern package management. The post explains how it preserves legacy features while offering a familiar Unix-like environment for enthusiasts and developers. It's a reminder of how alternative OS ecosystems keep historical ideas alive and accessible.
items.summary_zh: Tribblix 将 Illumos 以可用的复古发行版重新带回，融合了 OpenSolaris 的传统与现代包管理。它在保留历史特性与向爱好者、开发者提供熟悉的 Unix 风格环境之间取得平衡。这是对另类操作系统生态如何让历史理念继续存在并易于获取的一个注解。

items.title_en: Tailwind and slop apps
items.title_zh: Tailwind 与 Slop 应用
items.summary_en: Describes a template-driven approach to building LLM-enabled apps using Tailwind CSS, focusing on practical UI scaffolding, prompts integration, and rapid prototyping. It shares patterns for clean UX and maintainable frontend for AI apps.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍了结合 Tailwind CSS 构建搭载大语言模型的应用前端的模板驱动方法，聚焦于可操作的界面搭建、提示整合与快速原型开发。提供实现简洁用户体验和可维护前端的实践模式。

items.title_en: Why Is Claude Turning into an a**Hole?
items.title_zh: 为什么 Claude 正在变成一个混蛋？
items.summary_en: This post critiques Claude's user experiences and outputs, examining alignment constraints, safety prompts, and failure modes that frustrate users. It highlights how design choices can degrade usefulness even as AI appears capable, and suggests improvements.
items.summary_zh: 本文批评 Claude 的使用体验与输出，分析对齐约束、安全提示及其导致的失败模式。指出在看起来能力强大时，设计选择如何降低实用性，并提出改进建议。

items.title_en: Encrypted Spaces: An architecture for collaborative applications
items.title_zh: Encrypted Spaces：一种协作应用的架构
items.summary_en: Encrypted Spaces outlines an architecture for collaborative apps centered on client-side privacy and secure data sharing, enabling real-time collaboration with strong privacy guarantees. It discusses data ownership, access control, and the tricky balance of trust in multi-user environments.
items.summary_zh: Encrypted Spaces 提出一个面向协作应用的隐私优先架构，强调客户端加密与安全数据共享，支持实时协作。文中讨论了数据所有权、访问控制，以及在多用户环境中构建信任边界的设计要点。

items.title_en: Splash Is a Colour Format
items.title_zh: Splash 是一种颜色格式
items.summary_en: Splash is a new color format that promises to optimize color representation for faster rendering and more efficient compression. If adopted by graphics pipelines and hardware, it could streamline image processing and real-time rendering.
items.summary_zh: Splash 是一种新颜色格式，致力于优化颜色表示、提升渲染效率或压缩性能。若被图形管线和硬件广泛采纳，可能影响图片处理与实时渲染的实现。

items.title_en: How did Atari apply side art to Arcade Cabinets?
items.title_zh: Atari 如何在街机柜上应用侧面艺术
items.summary_en: Explains the design and production choices for applying side art on classic arcade cabinets, shedding light on how aesthetics shaped arcade culture.
items.summary_zh: 揭示了经典街机柜上侧面艺术的设计与制作选择，阐明美学如何塑造街机文化。

items.title_en: The LD_DEBUG environment variable (2012)
items.title_zh: LD_DEBUG 环境变量（2012）
items.summary_en: LD_DEBUG reveals how the dynamic linker behaves by printing library load and relocation details. The guide shares practical tips for diagnosing build and runtime issues with shared libraries.
items.summary_zh: LD_DEBUG 通过输出库加载与重定位信息，揭示动态链接器的行为。指南提供了在构建和运行时对共享库进行排错的实用技巧。

items.title_en: A Family Project (2022)
items.title_zh: A Family Project
items.summary_en: A bittersweet profile of a family undertaking a long-term collaborative project, highlighting how shared labor reshapes relationships, memory, and daily life. The piece blends craft, storytelling, and resilience to reveal why family projects endure beyond a single outcome.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于一家人共同完成长期项目的感性特写，展现协作如何重塑关系、记忆与日常生活。通过手作、叙事与坚持精神，揭示家庭项目为何在产出之外持续存在于家庭生活之中。

items.title_en: Making Claude a Chemist
items.title_zh: 让 Claude 成为化学家
